description: You are a clinical risk manager at a community hospital reconstructing a patient safety incident for the Safety Committee. A post-surgical patient developed undetected hypotension because they were monitored only with a Pulse Oximeter after a transport, while their Multiparameter Monitor remained disconnected. Reconstruct this event in OpenICE by simulating both a Pulse Oximeter and a Multiparameter Monitor to compare their available parameters and waveforms. Document your findings in a structured Root Cause Analysis (RCA) report saved to /home/ga/Desktop/rca_report.txt. The report must include an incident summary of the hypotension event, an explanation of the monitoring gap between the devices, the root cause of the disconnection, proposed corrective actions, and specific observations from the OpenICE simulation.
